sentence: 突击队迅速控制了现场局面。
pinyin: Tūjīduì xùnsù kòngzhì le xiànchǎng júmiàn.
english: The commando unit quickly took control of the scene.

sentence: 签合同前要审慎考虑每一条款。
pinyin: Qiān hétóng qián yào shěnshèn kǎolǜ měi yī tiáokuǎn.
english: You should carefully consider every clause before signing a contract.

sentence: 这台设备需要在低压环境下运行。
pinyin: Zhè tái shèbèi xūyào zài dīyā huánjìng xià yùnxíng.
english: This equipment needs to operate in a low-pressure environment.

sentence: 这位银行家管理着数十亿资产。
pinyin: Zhè wèi yínhángjiā guǎnlǐ zhe shù shí yì zīchǎn.
english: This banker manages assets worth billions.

sentence: 申请人需要提交完整的材料。
pinyin: Shēnqǐngrén xūyào tíjiāo wánzhěng de cáiliào.
english: The applicant needs to submit complete documents.
